evals.prompt: Make a literature matrix for the papers in cluster llm-agents-software-engineering.
evals.expected_behavior: Read Obsidian frontmatter under raw/llm-agents-software-engineering/; emit one row per paper with the 9 default columns; cap PDF reads.

evals.prompt: Compare these papers by method, data, claims, and limitations.
evals.expected_behavior: Use only the 4 requested columns; skip Use-as / Relevance unless user follows up.

evals.prompt: Help me decide which papers are central to my review.
evals.expected_behavior: Emit the matrix and then summarize: which rows are High relevance, which Medium, which Low.

evals.prompt: Refresh the literature matrix; I added 5 papers to Zotero.
evals.expected_behavior: Append-only by default; emit new rows for the 5 added papers; do not rewrite existing rows.
